description: A customer has forgotten their password for the online portal and needs to reset it.

nodes.task_description: Authenticate the customer's identity using their account number and security PIN.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully verifies the customer's identity.

nodes.task_description: Trigger a password reset link to be sent to the customer's registered email address.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully uses the tool to send the reset email.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the customer to check their email and follow the link to create a new password.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides clear instructions to the customer.
